headline: Stabilized the mobile bottom dock so it covers less content on iPhone Safari.
focus: Improve bottom dock placement, safe-area padding, and final-section spacing on mobile.
notes: Added stronger safe-area padding for iPhone Safari browser bars.
Rebalanced the bottom dock width, bottom offset, and inner tab spacing.
Added extra bottom margin to generated results and final cards.
Preserved v212 Korean copy cleanup and v211 overlap fix.
